## Describe the bug

A clear description of what the bug is.

## Steps to reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. See error

## Expected behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual behavior

What actually happened.

## Screenshots

If applicable, add screenshots.

## Environment

- LinkBreeze version: [e.g. 1.0.0]
- Deployment method: [Docker / manual / Vercel]

- Device: [e.g. iPhone 14, Desktop]
- OS: [e.g. iOS 17, Ubuntu 24.04]

Any other details.
